languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn snorts.{/n} "That mutant skull that Mistress Kibellah has chosen to establish familiar relations with is a crude anatomical aid and nothing more. I suppose her conversations can be characterised as a primitive means of meditation, where the individual projects her state of mind and thoughts onto some inanimate object and thereby achieves a certain degree of introspection. Nuncius, by contrast, contains a machine spirit, which we know every creation of the Omnissiah to possess, and he also happens to be a highly erudite and complex construct."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн фыркает.{/n} "Череп мутанта, с которым госпожа Кибелла решила установить фамильярные отношения — вульгарное анатомическое пособие и ничего более. Эти беседы, пожалуй, можно охарактеризовать как примитивный способ медитации, где индивидуум проецирует свое душевное состояние и мысли на какой-то неодушевленный объект и тем самым совершает определенную интроспекцию. Нунциус же содержит в себе машинный дух, которым, как мы знаем, обладает всякое творение Омниссии, и являет собой весьма эрудированный и комплексный конструкт".

{n}Eogunn snorts.{/n} "That mutant skull that Mistress Kibellah has chosen to establish familiar relations with is a crude anatomical aid and nothing more. languages.text: {n}Eogunn resopla.{/n} «El cráneo mutante con el que la señorita Kibellah ha decidido establecer una relación familiar no es más que un pobre utensilio anatómico. Supongo que sus conversaciones se pueden caracterizar como una forma primitiva de meditación en la que el individuo proyecta su estado mental y sus pensamientos en un objeto inanimado para obtener cierto grado de introspección. Nuncius, a diferencia de eso, contiene un espíritu máquina, al igual que todas las creaciones del Omnissiah, y es un constructo erudito y altamente complejo».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn snorts.{/n} "That mutant skull that Mistress Kibellah has chosen to establish familiar relations with is a crude anatomical aid and nothing more. I suppose her conversations can be characterised as a primitive means of meditation, where the individual projects her state of mind and thoughts onto some inanimate object and thereby achieves a certain degree of introspection. Nuncius, by contrast, contains a machine spirit, which we know every creation of the Omnissiah to possess, and he also happens to be a highly erudite and complex construct."

Supongo que sus conversaciones se pueden caracterizar como una forma primitiva de meditación en la que el individuo proyecta su estado mental y sus pensamientos en un objeto inanimado para obtener cierto grado de introspección. Nuncius, a diferencia de eso, contiene un espíritu máquina, al igual que todas las creaciones del Omnissiah, y es un constructo erudito y altamente complejo».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡嗤笑一声。{/n}“绮贝菈女士选择建立伙伴关系的那颗变种人头骨，不过是个粗糙的解剖教具罢了。我猜她和那东西的对话，充其量只是种原始的冥想方式——个体将自己的心境和想法投射到某个无生命的物体上，从而获得某种程度的内省。相比之下，努恩修斯体内可是有机魂的，正如我们所知，欧姆尼赛亚的每一件造物都拥有机魂，而且他还是一个学富五车、结构极其复杂的杰作。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn snorts.{/n} "That mutant skull that Mistress Kibellah has chosen to establish familiar relations with is a crude anatomical aid and nothing more. Nuncius, by contrast, contains a machine spirit, which we know every creation of the Omnissiah to possess, and he also happens to be a highly erudite and complex construct."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn étouffe un rire.{/n} « Ce crâne mutant avec lequel maîtresse Kibellah a choisi de tisser des liens familiers n'est qu'une aide anatomique rudimentaire, rien de plus. J'imagine qu'on pourrait qualifier ses conversations de forme primitive de méditation, où l'individu projette son état d'esprit et ses pensées sur un objet inanimé, ce qui lui permet d'atteindre un certain degré d'introspection. Pour sa part, Nuncius renferme un esprit de la machine, comme chaque création de l'Omnimessie, mais c'est aussi une structure complexe et incroyablement savante. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn snorts.{/n} "That mutant skull that Mistress Kibellah has chosen to establish familiar relations with is a crude anatomical aid and nothing more. I suppose her conversations can be characterised as a primitive means of meditation, where the individual projects her state of mind and thoughts onto some inanimate object and thereby achieves a certain degree of introspection. Nuncius, by contrast, contains a machine spirit, which we know every creation of the Omnissiah to possess, and he also happens to be a highly erudite and complex construct."

Pour sa part, Nuncius renferme un esprit de la machine, comme chaque création de l'Omnimessie, mais c'est aussi une structure complexe et incroyablement savante. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn schnaubt.{/n} "Dieser Mutantenschädel, mit dem Meisterin Kibellah eine familiäre Beziehung pflegt, ist nichts weiter als eine simple anatomische Hilfe. Ich denke, ihre Unterhaltungen lassen sich als primitives Mittel der Meditation beschreiben, bei der das Individuum seinen Geisteszustand und seine Gedanken auf ein unbelebtes Objekt projiziert, um so einen gewissen Grad der Introspektion zu erreichen. Nuncius hingegen enthält einen Maschinengeist, den, wie wir wissen, alle Kreationen des Omnissiah besitzen. Überdies ist er ein hochgradig gebildetes und komplexes Konstrukt."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn snorts.{/n} "That mutant skull that Mistress Kibellah has chosen to establish familiar relations with is a crude anatomical aid and nothing more. Nuncius, by contrast, contains a machine spirit, which we know every creation of the Omnissiah to possess, and he also happens to be a highly erudite and complex construct."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは鼻を鳴らす。{/n}「ミストレス・キベラが親密な関係を結ぼうと選んだあの突然変異の頭蓋骨は、粗雑な解剖学的補助具にすぎず、それ以上のものではない。彼女の会話は、原始的な瞑想の手段とでも言えるだろう――無生物に自らの精神状態や思考を投影することで、ある程度の内省を得るのだ。対照的に、ヌンキウスには機械霊が宿っている。オムニサイアの被造物はすべてそれを備えていると我々は知っているが、彼はそれに加えて、きわめて博識で複雑な構築物でもあるのだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn snorts.{/n} "That mutant skull that Mistress Kibellah has chosen to establish familiar relations with is a crude anatomical aid and nothing more. I suppose her conversations can be characterised as a primitive means of meditation, where the individual projects her state of mind and thoughts onto some inanimate object and thereby achieves a certain degree of introspection. Nuncius, by contrast, contains a machine spirit, which we know every creation of the Omnissiah to possess, and he also happens to be a highly erudite and complex construct."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn homurdanıyor.{/n} "Kibellah Hanım'ın yakınlık kurmaya karar verdiği o mutant kafatası, kaba bir anatomik yardımcıdan fazlası değil. Konuşmalarının, bireyin ruh hâlini ve düşüncelerini cansız bir nesneye yansıtarak belirli bir iç gözlem derecesine ulaştığı ilkel bir meditasyon aracı olarak karakterize edilebileceğini varsayıyorum. Buna karşılık Nuncius, Hermesih'in her yaratımının sahip olduğunu bildiğimiz bir makine ruhuna sahip. Aynı zamanda son derece bilgili ve karmaşık bir yapı."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn snorts.{/n} "That mutant skull that Mistress Kibellah has chosen to establish familiar relations with is a crude anatomical aid and nothing more.
